title: Replit vs Claude Code: Which Is Better for Building Web Products?
abstract: A stage-based comparison of Replit vs Claude Code for web product development, from prototype speed to production maintainability.
meta-title: Replit vs Claude Code: Which Is Better for Building Web Products?
meta-description: Compare Replit and Claude Code by project stage. Learn when to use each for faster prototyping, stronger implementation, and production-ready workflows.
